reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and returned a response confirming "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Super Agent homepage with three agents listed in the sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260424-110521-rbl5" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent chat interface with empty message input field and idle status
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the message input field — Message was successfully entered and visible in the textbox
Clicked the Send message button — Message was successfully sent and the agent began working on the task (status changed to "working" with "Browser Page Title Lookup" task active)
Waited up to 3 minutes for the agent to complete the task and provide a response — Agent completed the task in 7 seconds and displayed the response: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"."

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" and took a final screenshot — The response clearly states the page title is "Example Domain", and the browser preview panel on the right displays the Example Domain webpage confirming successful navigation and retrieval
